com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.keyboard

Class KeyboardParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.keyboard.KeyboardParameters

  • public class KeyboardParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    Parameters for keyboard entry.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      KeyboardMode getKeyboardMode()
      Gets keyboard mode.
      byte getMaxLen()
      Gets maximum number of characters to input.

      Gets minimum number of characters to input.

      Gets prompt ID.

      Sets keyboard mode.

      Sets maximum number of characters to input.

      Sets the Minimum number of characters to input.

    • Method Detail

      • getPromptID

        public PromptID getPromptID()
        Gets prompt ID.
        Returns:
        Indicates what message to prompt. See PromptID.

      • setPromptID

        public void setPromptID(PromptID promptId)
        Sets prompt ID.
        Parameters:
        promptId - Indicates what message to prompt. See PromptID.

      • getKeyboardMode

        public KeyboardMode getKeyboardMode()
        Gets keyboard mode.
        Returns:
        Keyboard mode, see KeyboardMode.

      • setKeyboardMode

        public void setKeyboardMode(KeyboardMode keyboardMode)
        Sets keyboard mode.
        Parameters:
        keyboardMode - Keyboard mode, see KeyboardMode.

      • getMinLen

        public byte getMinLen()
        Gets minimum number of characters to input.
        Returns:
        Minimum number of characters to input, shall be between 1 and maximum number.

      • setMinLen

        public void setMinLen(byte minLen)
        Sets the Minimum number of characters to input.
        Parameters:
        minLen - Minimum number of characters to input, shall be between 1 and maximum number.

      • getMaxLen

        public byte getMaxLen()
        Gets maximum number of characters to input.
        Returns:
        Maximum number of characters to input, shall be <= 32 but >= minimum number.

      • setMaxLen

        public void setMaxLen(byte maxLen)
        Sets maximum number of characters to input.
        Parameters:
        maxLen - Maximum number of characters to input, shall be <= 32 but >= minimum number.
